_comment: slug -> corrected {lat,lng,state,keepRegion}. Fixes bulk destinations that inherited wrong coords/state from upstream Wikidata/Wikipedia. Consumed by scripts/build-json-data.js; distanceFromDelhi + reach + map + weather recompute from these. Omit lat/lng to fix only the state label. NOTE: Category-B slugs (coords were wrong) also have stale topPlaces fetched at the old location — re-fetch places around the new coords to fully fix.
